ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, commissioner, owner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "element" INTEGER /* Reference to the element (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the player */,
  "GW" INTEGER /* Gameweek number */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_element FOREIGN KEY ("element") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the team (e.g., 100, 200) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the fixture */,
  "opponent_team" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "was_home" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player's team was the home team */,
  "gameweek" INTEGER /* Gameweek number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_opponent_team FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team") REFERENCES opponent_teams ("opponent_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_teams" (
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_fixtures" (
  "player_fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player fixture */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fixture */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player's team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the player's team */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals scored by the player */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the player */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_fixtures_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_fixtures_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of the league (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_leagues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Total value of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES user_leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fixture */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES user_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fixture */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., in, out) */,
  "transfer_time" TEXT /* Time of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES user_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fixture */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score earned by the player */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points earned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_scores" (
  "user_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user score */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fixture */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score earned by the user team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_scores_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the user in the league */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES user_leagues ("league_id")
)
